title: Timeless Colonial Boutique Lodging
subtitle: THE ACCOMMODATIONS
text_content: With 112 beautifully arranged rooms stretching across 6 floors, Mutiara Hotel & Convention pairs authentic tiled floors and classic woodwork layouts with modern comforts. From cozy budget stays to sprawling multi-room family suites, every space is fully soundproofed and air-conditioned to serve as your private sanctuary.

title: Authentic Hospitality by the Crystalline Pool
subtitle: LEISURE & CALM
text_content: Escape the bustle of Pasirkaliki inside our peaceful courtyard garden. Spend your mornings enjoying a hearty breakfast at Tiara Restaurant with direct views of the water, or lounge on our premium poolside sun chairs while our 24-hour concierge and guest service desk takes care of your every travel requirement.

title: Ramadhan Kareem Iftar Culinary Gathering
subtitle: EXPIRED EVENT
text_content: Celebrate blessings with family and colleagues inside our Grand Ballroom. Our special Sundanese-Arabian fusion buffet menu featured over 40 traditional dishes, custom ice carving stations, and live music presentations to elevate your breaking-of-the-fast moments.
